name: AI data readiness brief with human review

parameters.functionCode: return items.map(item => ({ json: { ...item.json, human_review_required: true, approved_inputs_only: true, blocker_check_required: true } }));
return items.map(item => ({ json: { status: 'DRAFT_REQUIRES_HUMAN_REVIEW', next_step: 'Reviewer confirms data owner, sensitivity, metric, and escalation path.' } }));

parameters.subject: Agentic workflow brief requires review
parameters.text: A draft brief is ready. Review data source, blockers, privacy boundary, pilot metric, and escalation path before use.

notes: Portfolio-only n8n workflow export. It demonstrates orchestration and human review controls, not production automation.
